summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Vikastra Technologies site. All 18 pytest backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified: home page renders with Three.js hero + all sections, contact form submission succeeds (shows 'Message sent! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.' toast and persists to DB), /admin redirects to login when unauthenticated, admin login with provided credentials lands on dashboard, stats cards + leads list + lead detail panel work, status updates (NEW/CONTACTED/CLOSED) update DB and stats, native confirm-based delete removes lead and shows 'Lead deleted' toast, logout clears cookie and returns to /admin/login.

issues: Uses native browser confirm() dialog for delete - consider replacing with custom modal for consistency with the futuristic dark theme.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py on_startup uses ADMIN_PASSWORD env var to overwrite existing admin password whenever the hash doesn't verify - this is intentional for dev seed but means changing ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env forcibly resets admin password on every backend restart. Acceptable for this fresh build, but document this behavior.
PATCH /api/admin/leads/{id} accepts status as query param rather than JSON body - works but a JSON body would be more RESTful and consistent.

GET /api/admin/stats compares created_at strings with $gte against ISO string - works for ISO 8601 strings but is timezone-sensitive; storing created_at as a real BSON date would be safer for range queries.
JWT cookie uses samesite=none secure=true which requires HTTPS (fine for preview/prod) but won't be sent on localhost http during local dev - documented in agent_to_agent_context_note.
Frontend Contact section: nav label is 'Work' while the spec mentioned 'portfolio'. Minor copy difference, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_-prefixed leads via the public /api/contact endpoint during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers root, auth (login/logout/me with cookie+bearer), contact validation, admin leads CRUD, stats. JWT cookie is samesite=none/secure=true so use HTTPS preview URL. Native window.confirm() is used in AdminDashboard delete - register page.on('dialog', d: d.accept()) before clicking Delete. Three.js animations need ~3s settle time before screenshots.
